fields.explainZh: 标识当前群集是否支持自适应优化。
fields.explainEn: Indicates if the cluster supports adaptive optimization.

fields.explainZh: 属于当前群集的存储模块数。
fields.explainEn: Number of storage modules belonging to the cluster.

fields.explainZh: 当前群集的可用空间大小。
fields.explainEn: Available space in bytes for the cluster.

fields.explainZh: 当前群集的总空间大小。
fields.explainEn: Total space in bytes for the cluster.

fields.explainZh: 当前群集每块存储的IP地址。
fields.explainEn: List of IP addresses for each store in the cluster.

fields.explainZh: 当前群集支持的特性列表。
fields.explainEn: List of licensed features supported for the cluster.

fields.explainZh: 标识虚拟IP地址是否可用。
fields.explainEn: Indicates if the virtual IP address is enabled.
CPU usage of the H3C P5730.

fields.explainZh: H3C P5730存储的内存利用率。
fields.explainEn: Memory usage of the H3C P5730.
Available space in bytes using the accompanying replicationLevel.

fields.explainZh: 网关的主机连接的IP地址。
fields.explainEn: IP address of the gateway hosting the connection.
I/O reads and writes per second.
Rate at which bytes are read from the cluster during read operations.
Rate at which bytes are transferred from the cluster during read operations.

fields.explainZh: 群集读写队列深度总和。

fields.explainEn: Rate at which bytes are write from the cluster during read operations.
I/O reads and writes per second.
Rate at which bytes are read from the volume during read operations.

fields.explainZh: 存储卷每秒读写字节数。
fields.explainEn: Rate at which bytes are transferred from the volume during read operations.

fields.explainZh: 存储卷读写队列深度总和。

fields.explainEn: Rate at which bytes are write from the volume during read operations.

fields.explainZh: 服务器上光纤通道启动卷的标识符。
fields.explainEn: Fibre Channel boot volume identifier for the server.

fields.explainZh: 服务器上光纤通道启动卷LUN的标识符。
fields.explainEn: Fibre Channel boot volume LUN for the server.

fields.explainZh: 服务器的CHAP发起程序机密。
fields.explainEn: CHAP initiator secret for the server.
Indicates whether CHAP is required for the server.

fields.explainZh: 该控制服务器的名称或IP地址。
fields.explainEn: The name or IP address of controlling server.

fields.explainZh: 标识光纤通道是否启用。
fields.explainEn: Indicates whether Fibre Channel is enabled.

fields.explainZh: 标识服务器是否属于一个群集。
fields.explainEn: Indicates whether the server belongs to a server cluster.

fields.explainZh: 标识iSCSI负载平衡是否已启用。
fields.explainEn: Indicates whether iSCSI load balancing is enabled.

fields.explainZh: 网关的主机连接的IP地址。
fields.explainEn: IP address of the gateway hosting the connection.
IP address of the iSCSI initiator.
IP port of the iSCSI initiator.
Indicates if the session is resettin.
IP address of the iSCSI target.
IP port of the iSCSI target.
Number of bytes written in the snapshot.
ID of the cluster that contains the snapshot.
Name of the cluster that contains the snapshot.

fields.nameZh: 是否存在不可恢复错误
fields.explainZh: 是否存在不可恢复错误。
标识快照是在线还是离线。
fields.explainEn: Indicates whether the snapshot is online or offline.

fields.explainZh: 表示快照是否是主快照（与远程快照）。
fields.explainEn: Indicates whether the snapshot is a primary snapshot (versus a remote snapshot).
Identifier of the application managing the snapshot.
SCSI transport type for the snapshot.

fields.explainZh: 标识传输服务器。仅适用于光纤通道。
写入快照的数据量。这是写入快照和所有父快照数据的总和。
fields.explainEn: Amount of data written to the snapshot in bytes. This is a summation of data written to the snapshot and all parent snapshots.

fields.explainZh: LUN分配到快照的权限。仅适用于光纤通道。
fields.explainEn: LUN assigned to the snapshot for these permissions. Only applicable to FibreCchannel.

fields.explainZh: 该存储卷已写空间大小。
fields.explainEn: Number of bytes written in the volume.
Name of the cluster that contains the volume.

fields.explainZh: 标识该存储卷是在线还是离线。
fields.explainEn: Indicates whether the volume is online or offline.

fields.explainZh: 存储在整个存储系统数据的份数。
fields.explainEn: Number of copies of data stored across the storage systems.

fields.explainZh: 返回传输服务器的卷的服务器ID。这是分配给处理用于在卷的SCSI命令的存储系统。
LUN分配到存储卷的权限。仅适用于光纤通道连接。
fields.explainEn: LUN assigned to the volume for these permissions. Applicable only to fibre channel connections.

fields.explainZh: 测试IP对应资源的协议连接。
fields.explainEn: Test the protocol connections of the resource corresponding to an IP address.
